mapper.insert: insert into favorite (user_id, content_id, create_time) values (#{userId}, #{contentId}, now())
mapper.select: select f.id, f.content_id as contentId, c.title, c.content, c.cover_img as coverImg, c.category_id as categoryId, c.like_count as likeCount, c.favorite_count as favoriteCount, c.comment_count as commentCount, c.view_count as viewCount, c.status, f.create_time as createTime from favorite f left join content c on f.content_id = c.id where f.user_id = #{userId} order by f.create_time desc
